user.title: Set up Wattson
user.description: Choose how Wattson controls your battery. The next steps connect your measurements and control entities before the integration becomes active.

sources.title: Measurements and forecasts
sources.description: Select the three required measurements. PV and EV entities are optional. Power sensors may use W or kW; energy forecasts may use Wh, kWh or MWh.

data.ent_price: Dynamic price sensor with hourly forecast
data.ent_wallbox_1_thuis: EV 1 at-home gate (optional; charging elsewhere is ignored)
data.ent_wallbox_2_thuis: EV 2 at-home gate (optional; charging elsewhere is ignored)

adapter.title: Battery control
adapter.description: Select the entities Wattson may control. Telemetry is optional, but enables watchdog protection and better load estimation.

data.ent_zd_acmode: Zendure AC mode select (input/output, strongly recommended)

battery.title: Battery limits
battery.description: Enter the usable battery limits. Wattson never plans outside these values.

data.wedge_post_saldering: Export price discount after net-metering ends (EUR/kWh, from 2027)
data.ent_import_totalen: Grid import total counters (yearly netting guard, optional)
data.ent_export_totalen: Grid export total counters (yearly netting guard, optional)

error.invalid_number: One of the numeric values is not a valid number.
error.soc_out_of_range: Minimum SoC must be between 0 and 100%.
error.generic_power_missing: Choose a signed power entity, or both charge and discharge entities.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Wattson is already configured. Only one instance is allowed.

init.title: Wattson — source entities
init.description: Point Wattson at the entities on your own installation.

data.ent_price: Price sensor (dynamic tariff, with forecast attribute)
data.ent_wallbox_1_thuis: EV 1 at-home gate (optional; charging elsewhere is ignored)
data.ent_wallbox_2_thuis: EV 2 at-home gate (optional; charging elsewhere is ignored)
data.ent_zd_acmode: Battery AC mode select (input/output, strongly recommended)
data.ent_bat_chg: Battery charge power sensor (optional, enables watchdog)
data.ent_bat_dis: Battery discharge power sensor (optional, enables watchdog)
data.ent_gen_power: Generic: signed power number (+W charge / -W discharge)
data.ent_ms_mode: Marstek: force mode entity (select or number, 0=stop/1=charge/2=discharge)
data.wedge_post_saldering: Export price discount after net-metering ends (EUR/kWh, from 2027)
data.ent_import_totalen: Grid import total counters (yearly netting guard, optional)
data.ent_export_totalen: Grid export total counters (yearly netting guard, optional)

error.invalid_number: One of the numeric values is not a valid number.
error.soc_out_of_range: Minimum SoC must be between 0 and 100%.
error.generic_power_missing: Generic adapter needs a signed power number, or both a charge and a discharge number.
